title: 3 Stocks To Help Survive A Bear Market
text: Interactive Brokers is a big beneficiary of both higher market volatility and higher interest rates. Berkshire Hathaway's balance sheet and value investing mindset mean Buffett will probably grab bargains during the downturn.

title: OSL Digital Securities and Interactive Brokers Sign Agreement, OSL to Provide Exclusive Virtual Asset Services for Interactive Brokers in Hong Kong
text: HONG KONG , June 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- OSL Digital Securities, the world's first Type 1 and 7 Securities and Futures Commission (SFC)-licensed digital asset brokerage and trading platform for professional investors, and a subsidiary of BC Technology Group (stock code: 863 HK), and Interactive Brokers (Nasdaq: IBKR), an automated global electronic broker, announced today the appointment of OSL Digital Securities to provide exclusive virtual asset dealing services for Interactive Brokers in Hong Kong. A significant milestone in the evolution of the Hong Kong digital asset markets, the agreement represents the first collaboration between one of the largest SFC-regulated online brokers serving Hong Kong professional investors and an SFC-licensed institutional digital asset brokerage and exchange.

title: 盈透证券推出欧洲股票和交易所交易基金零股交易
text: 康涅狄格州格林尼治--(BUSINESS WIRE)--(美国商业资讯)--全球自动化电子经纪商盈透证券 (Interactive Brokers, Nasdaq: IBKR)今日宣布推出欧洲股票和交易所交易基金(ETF)零股交易。盈透证券的客户现在能够以“零股”方式买卖符合条件的美国和欧洲股票以及ETF，为打造平衡的资产组合以及投资股票提供了一种简单的方式，且不受股票价格的限制。“零股”是指价值不足一整股的股票单元。 通过零股交易，投资者可购买欧洲股票，无最低数量要求；投资者也可以投资美国股票，购买额可低至1美元，无需考虑股价。投资者可以利用零股交易将小额现金余额快速用于投资，并尽可能实现更高回报，无需持有现金并赚取较低回报。此外，盈透证券还提供了现金数额股票订单，帮助客户以特定现金金额下单。如果现金金额无法购买整数股的股票，那么将自动购买或出售零股。 盈透证券营销与产品开发执行副总裁Steve Sanders表示：“盈透证券是首家在美国引入零股交易的大型经纪商，推出后深受客户欢迎。除了让客户投资更多股票、帮助客户实现资产组合多元化这一优势之外，增加欧洲零股交易还为投资者提供了以更加灵活可负担的方式进行跨市场交易的机会。” 盈透证券旗下所有多功能交易平台均提供零股交易服务，包括能够让投资者交易全球股票的轻量级移动交易应用IBKR GlobalTrader。在某些交易所上市、且日交易额超过500万美元、市值高于50亿美元的欧洲股票和ETF，都支持欧洲零股交易。 如需了解更多信息，请访问： 美国及有限责任公司(LLC)服务国家：零股 加拿大：零股 英国：零股 西欧：零股 中欧：零股 澳大利亚：零股 香港：零股 印度：零股 新加坡：零股 关于盈透证券集团有限公司： 盈透证券集团附属公司通过一个统一平台，在多个国家的超过150个市场以多种货币向全球客户提供全天候的证券、商品和外汇自动化交易执行与保管服务。我们的服务对象涵盖个人投资者、对冲基金、自营交易集团、财务顾问和介绍经纪商。四十年来对于技术和自动化的专注，让我们能够为客户提供独特的尖端平台，供其管理投资组合。我们致力于以低廉的价格或是免费为客户提供有利的执行价格和交易、风险与投资组合管理工具、研究工具和投资产品，从而帮助其实现优厚的投资回报。在《巴伦周刊》2022年3月25日发布的“最佳互联网券商评比”中，盈透证券连续第5年荣获五星（最高五星），位列第一。 免责声明：本公告之原文版本乃官方授权版本。译文仅供方便了解之用，烦请参照原文，原文版本乃唯一具法律效力之版本。

title: 盈透證券推出歐洲股票和交易所交易基金零股交易
text: 康乃狄克州格林尼治--(BUSINESS WIRE)--(美國商業資訊)--全球自動化電子經紀商盈透證券 (Interactive Brokers, Nasdaq: IBKR)今日宣佈，推出歐洲股票和交易所交易基金(ETF)零股交易。盈透證券的客戶現在能夠以「零股」方式買賣符合條件的美國和歐洲股票以及ETF，此提供簡單的方式以建立平衡的資產組合及投資股票，且不受股票價格的限制。「零股」是指價值不足完整一股的股票單位。 投資人可利用零股交易購買歐洲股票，無最低數量要求；投資人也可以投資美國股票，購買額可低至1美元，無需考慮股價。投資人可以利用零股交易將小額現金餘額快速用於投資，並盡量擴大報酬率，而非持有現金並賺取較低的回報。此外，盈透證券還提供現金數額股票訂單，使客戶能夠以特定現金金額下單。如果現金金額無法購買整數股的股票，那麼將自動購買或出售零股。 盈透證券行銷與產品開發執行副總裁Steve Sanders表示：「盈透證券是首家在美國引進零股交易的大型經紀商，推出後深受客戶歡迎。除了讓客戶可投資更多股票、協助客戶的資產組合多元化這一優勢之外，增加歐洲零股交易還為投資人提供了以更加靈活、可負擔的方式在各個市場進行交易的機會。」 盈透證券旗下所有強大的交易平臺均提供零股交易服務，包括能夠讓投資人交易全球股票的簡易型行動交易應用程式IBKR GlobalTrader。在某些交易所上市的日交易額超過500萬美元且市值高於50億美元的歐洲股票和ETF，都適用於歐洲零股交易。 如欲瞭解更多資訊，請造訪： 美國及有限責任公司(LLC)服務的國家：零股 加拿大：零股 英國：零股 西歐：零股 中歐：零股 澳洲：零股 香港：零股 印度：零股 新加坡：零股 關於盈透證券集團有限公司： 盈透證券集團附屬公司透過一個統一平臺，在多個國家的超過150個市場以多種貨幣為全球客戶提供全天候的證券、商品和外匯自動化交易執行與保管服務。我們的服務對象涵蓋個人投資人、避險基金、自營交易集團、財務顧問和交易輔助人。四十年來對於科技和自動化的專注，讓我們能夠為客戶提供獨特的尖端平臺，供其管理投資組合。我們致力於以低廉的價格或是免費為客戶提供有利的執行價格和交易、風險與投資組合管理工具、研究工具和投資產品，從而協助其取得優厚的投資回報。在《巴倫週刊》2022年3月25日發佈的「最佳線上券商評比」中，盈透證券連續第5年榮獲五星（最高五星），位居第一。 免責聲明：本公告之原文版本乃官方授權版本。譯文僅供方便瞭解之用，煩請參照原文，原文版本乃唯一具法律效力之版本。

title: Interactive Brokers Group Reports Brokerage Metrics and Other Financial Information for May 2022, includes Reg.-NMS Execution Statistics
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) an automated global electronic broker, today reported its Electronic Brokerage monthly performance metrics for May. Brokerage highlights for the month included: 2.297 million Daily Average Revenue Trades (DARTs)1, 2% higher than prior year and 4% higher than prior month. Ending client equity of $314.6 billion, 10% lower than prior year and 3% lower than prior month, primarily due to an omnibus broker that is now using a trust company for custody. Ending client margin loan balances of $44.2 billion, 3% lower than prior year and 6% lower than prior month. Ending client credit balances of $91.8 billion, including $2.2 billion in insured bank deposit sweeps2, 14% higher than prior year and 1% higher than prior month. 1.89 million client accounts, 36% higher than prior year and 2% higher than prior month. 274 annualized average cleared DARTs1 per client account. Average commission per cleared Commissionable Order3 of $2.66 including exchange, clearing and regulatory fees. Key products: $1.90 $3.68 $3.49 Futures include options on futures. We estimate exchange, clearing and regulatory fees to be 57% of the futures commissions. Other financial information for Interactive Brokers Group: GLOBAL4: The value of the GLOBAL, reported in U.S. dollars, increased by 0.25% in May. In the interest of transparency, we quantify our IBKR PRO clients’ all-in cost of trade execution below. For the full multimedia release with graph see link: https://www.interactivebrokers.com/MonthlyMetrics In May, IBKR PRO clients’ total cost of executing and clearing U.S. Reg.-NMS stocks through IB was about 3.1 basis points of trade money5, as measured against a daily VWAP6 benchmark (3.4 basis points net cost for the rolling twelve months). trade was 3.4 basis points. ________________ Note 1: Daily Average Revenue Trades (DARTs) – customer orders divided by the number of trading days in the period. Note 2: FDIC insured client bank deposit sweep program balances with participating banks. These deposits are not reported in the Company’s statement of financial condition. Note 3: Commissionable Order – a customer order that generates commissions. Note 4: In connection with our currency diversification strategy, we have determined to base our net worth in GLOBALs, a basket of 10 major currencies in which we hold our equity. The total effect of the currency diversification strategy is reported in Comprehensive Income and the components are reported in (1) Other Income and (2) Other Comprehensive Income (“OCI”) on the balance sheet. The effect of the GLOBAL on our comprehensive income can be estimated by multiplying the total equity for the period by the change in the U.S. dollar value of the GLOBAL during the same period. Note 5: Trade money is the total amount of money clients spent or received, including all commissions and fees. Note 6: Consistent with the clients’ trading activity, the computed VWAP benchmark includes extended trading hours. _________________ More information, including historical results for each of the above metrics, can be found on the investor relations page of the Company’s corporate web site, www.interactivebrokers.com/ir. About Interactive Brokers Group, Inc.: Interactive Brokers Group affiliates provide automated trade execution and custody of securities, commodities and foreign exchange around the clock on over 150 markets in numerous countries and currencies, from a single integrated platform to clients worldwide. We service individual investors, hedge funds, proprietary trading groups, financial advisors and introducing brokers. Our four decades of focus on technology and automation has enabled us to equip our clients with a uniquely sophisticated platform to manage their investment portfolios. We strive to provide our clients with advantageous execution prices and trading, risk and portfolio management tools, research facilities and investment products, all at low or no cost, positioning them to achieve superior returns on investments. For the fifth consecutive year, Barron’s ranked Interactive Brokers #1 with 5 out of 5 stars in its March 25, 2022, Best Online Brokers Review. title: Interactive Brokers Group to Present at Piper Sandler Global Exchange & FinTech Conference
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) announces that its Chairman Thomas Peterffy will speak at the Piper Sandler Global Exchange & FinTech Conference on Wednesday, June 8th at 8:00 a.m. ET. Mr. Peterffy's presentation can be heard live via webcast on the Internet accessible from the company's website, www.interactivebrokers.com/ir. Participants should log in approximately 10 minutes prior to the start of the presentation. A replay will also be available on the company's website. About Interactive Brokers Group, Inc.: Interactive Brokers Group affiliates provide automated trade execution and custody of securities, commodities and foreign exchange around the clock on over 150 markets in numerous countries and currencies, from a single unified platform to clients worldwide. We service individual investors, hedge funds, proprietary trading groups, financial advisors and introducing brokers. Our four decades of focus on technology and automation has enabled us to equip our clients with a uniquely sophisticated platform to manage their investment portfolios. We strive to provide our clients with advantageous execution prices and trading, risk and portfolio management tools, research facilities and investment products, all at low or no cost, positioning them to achieve superior returns on investments. For the fifth consecutive year, Barron’s ranked Interactive Brokers #1 with 5 out of 5 stars in its March 25, 2022, Best Online Brokers Review.
